name: Text field

variants.name: numeric
variants.description: Numeric input. Text right-aligned, unit displayed and cannot be overwritten.

placeholder.note: Only for non-critical hints. Not accessible — do not rely on it.

help_text.note: Do not repeat the label. Replaced by error message on validation failure.

error_message.note: Guides user to resolve the error. Replaces help text.

optional.note: If true, appends (optional) to label. Do not mark required fields.

unit.note: Numeric variant only. Cannot be overwritten by user.

width.note: Should be wide enough to show longest expected value.

usage_rules.detail: Never use asterisk or 'required' label. Only ask for information truly needed. Mark optional fields with (optional) appended to label.
On validation error, the error message replaces the help text. Never show both simultaneously.

usage_rules.rule: Help text must not repeat the label
usage_rules.detail: Help text provides additional context. Do not repeat the label or placeholder content.
Placeholder text disappears on focus. Only use for non-critical example hints. Never use as a substitute for a label.
Label, placeholder, help text, and error text must all use sentence case.

usage_rules.rule: Width should reflect expected input length
usage_rules.detail: As a general rule, width should be large enough to show the longest valid input. This hints at the expected value.
In numeric variant, input text is right-aligned and a unit is displayed. The unit cannot be edited by the user.
Error messages should guide the user to solve the problem, not just state that there is one.

accessibility.label_association: label must be programmatically associated via htmlFor / aria-labelledby
accessibility.error_association: error message must be linked via aria-describedby
keyboard: Enter to submit if in form

confidence_blockers: If ticket marks required fields with asterisk, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket shows help text and error message simultaneously, flag.
If placeholder is used as the only label, flag — a visible label is required.
agent_instructions.token_resolution: Border color and width must always match state: Border.Focused + Border.Width.Focus on focus, Border.Critical + Border.Width.Critical on error.

embedding_text: Text field input field form field. Single line text entry or numeric with unit. States: default focused filled disabled read only error. Has label placeholder help text error message icon info button. Required fields not marked only optional marked. Error replaces help text. Sentence case. Accessible label required.
